content.text:
It's just... quiet. Too quiet. I lie there and my brain starts going and I can't turn it off. What I should have said, what I didn't say, whether she knew. That kind of thing.

The wine helps with that. It's the only thing that actually works, you know? I take something to sleep sometimes but it doesn't stop the thoughts the way a drink does.

*quieter*

She died alone. I wasn't there. I was supposed to be there.
